headline: Alphabet Stock Joins the Dow but It’s Rising for a Different Reason
summary: The shares were up 1.2% in premarket trading.  The Google-parent is replacing  Verizon Communications  in the 30-stock Dow index from Monday’s session, in a move announced last week.  Because the Dow is a price-weighted index—meaning stock price rather than market capitalization determine the weighting of each company—few funds choose to replicate its composition.

headline: Morgan Stanley Lifts Tesla Delivery Forecast on Stronger Europe and China Demand (TSLA)
summary: Morgan Stanley has increased its forecast for Tesla’s (NASDAQ:TSLA) second-quarter vehicle deliveries after stronger-than-expected sales trends in Europe and China, although the bank continues to take a cautious view of the company’s energy storage business. The brokerage now expects Tesla to deliver around 413,000 vehicles during the second quarter, up from its previous estimate of approximately 373,000 and above the current market consensus of roughly 401,000 units.

content.title: Morgan Stanley Lifts Tesla Delivery Forecast on Stronger Europe and China Demand (TSLA)
content.summary: Morgan Stanley has increased its forecast for Tesla’s (NASDAQ:TSLA) second-quarter vehicle deliveries after stronger-than-expected sales trends in Europe and China, although the bank continues to take a cautious view of the company’s energy storage business. The brokerage now expects Tesla to deliver around 413,000 vehicles during the second quarter, up from its previous estimate of approximately 373,000 and above the current market consensus of roughly 401,000 units.

Alphabet’s move comes amid a broader rebound for the Magnificent Seven group of stocks on Monday.

headline: Tesla (TSLA) Teams With Sunrun And Renew Home On A 16 Gigawatt Virtual Power Plant
summary: Tesla, Sunrun, and Renew Home have agreed to combine residential batteries, rooftop solar, and smart devices into a nationwide virtual power plant. The alliance targets more than 16 gigawatts of flexible capacity for utilities and large data and AI operators across the U.S. The partnership aims to use existing home energy assets to support grid reliability while creating new revenue streams for participating households. Tesla, traded as NasdaqGS:TSLA, is extending its energy ambitions...

headline: Tesla Leads Magnificent Seven Recovery, Analysts Chime In On Deliveries

headline: Markets News, June 29, 2026: Dow Closes at Record; S&P 500, Nasdaq Rebound After Tech Sell-Off; Comcast Stock Surges on Plan to Split
summary: Major stock indexes finished higher Monday, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average closing at a record and the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite snapping five-session skids, as tech shares rebounded.

content.title: Markets News, June 29, 2026: Dow Closes at Record; S&P 500, Nasdaq Rebound After Tech Sell-Off; Comcast Stock Surges on Plan to Split
content.summary: Major stock indexes finished higher Monday, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average closing at a record and the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite snapping five-session skids, as tech shares rebounded.

thumbnail.caption: Comcast shares jumped Monday after the company said it planned to separate its media and technology businesses.Credit: Michael Nagle / Bloomberg via Getty Images
